message:
feat(classify): add `dcg classify` subcommand for bidirectional risk classification (#86)

Adds a new `classify` subcommand that returns structured risk classification
(JSON or text) instead of just block/pass. This enables Claude Code hooks to
use DCG bidirectionally -- both to block dangerous commands AND auto-allow
safe ones.

The classify output includes decision (allow/warn/block), risk_level
(safe/low/medium/high/critical), risk_score (0.0-1.0), matched reasons
with rule IDs, and safer alternative suggestions.

Exit codes follow the existing DCG contract: 0=allow, 1=block, 2=warn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
